mapper.select: SELECT g.*, sg.seckill_price, sg.stock_count, sg.start_time, sg.end_time FROM t_goods g LEFT JOIN t_seckill_goods sg ON g.id = sg.goods_id ORDER BY g.id
SELECT g.*, sg.seckill_price, sg.stock_count, sg.start_time, sg.end_time FROM t_goods g LEFT JOIN t_seckill_goods sg ON g.id = sg.goods_id WHERE g.id = #{id}

SELECT g.*, sg.seckill_price, sg.stock_count, sg.start_time, sg.end_time FROM t_goods g LEFT JOIN t_seckill_goods sg ON g.id = sg.goods_id WHERE g.id IN
#{id}
